name: Skeptical Mode for Market Analysis
description: Default to skeptical mode rather than optimistic mode when producing market analysis, competitive positioning, or strategic documents

should_have: Bear case scenario alongside bull case
must_not_have: Self-rating bias (rating own product highly without evidence)
Pitch deck language that obscures reality

rationale: Market-analysis.md contained multiple patterns of startup fantasy thinking: self-rating bias, fabricated statistics, optimistic timelines, and pitch deck language. Skeptical mode prevents these anti-patterns.
